summary: 2 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 3 trades.

film.title: The Family Stone
film.announcement: Sequel to 'The Family Stone' is in development with Luke Wilson attached to reprise his role.

film.title: The Odyssey
film.announcement: Robert Pattinson has been cast in 'The Odyssey' alongside Tom Holland.

tv.title: Man of Tomorrow
tv.announcement: Rick Devens from 'Big Brother 28' was set for a cameo in the Superman series but the appearance was cancelled due to CBS competition concerns.
